business_ideas.idea: Mr. Ballen Studios: recruiting elite storytellers as the Boston Red Sox of storytelling
Dark mystery and true crime storytelling platform with multi-show slate
Storytelling training and methodology courses for content creators
Podcast network focusing on niche storytelling genres

predictions.text: Storytelling and dark mystery content will remain highly competitive merit-based space with billions competing
Prestige in storytelling will consolidate around platforms like traditional sports franchises do
